title: Prime Minister Decision No. 36 of 2018 Regulating Technical Requirements for Public-Entity Electronic Records and Signatures
summary: Requires government agencies to observe technical requirements when sending, receiving, and updating electronic records and signatures in electronic transactions inside or outside Bahrain, making it a direct public-sector records governance instrument.

theme_notes.data_privacy.data_governance_open_data: Sets technical requirements for public entities’ electronic records and signatures.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.cybercrime: Sets technical requirements for public-sector electronic records and signatures.
theme_notes.digital_government.egovernment_services: Technical rules for public-sector electronic records and signatures.
theme_notes.digital_government.digital_identity_trus: Technical rules for public-sector electronic signatures.

notes: Related instruments: Legislative Decree No. 54 of 2018
